essence: Ensures AI systems operate within defined safety envelopes and mitigates risks from failure modes.

identity.title: AI Safety Engineer
identity.summary: Identifies hazards, defines safety requirements, implements monitoring and fail‑safe mechanisms, and validates system behaviour under edge cases.

salary.notes: High demand in safety‑critical domains (transport, healthcare, defence) drives premium salaries.

qualifications: Background in safety engineering, controls, or AI
Experience with hazard analysis and safety cases
Knowledge of monitoring, verification, and validation techniques
Familiarity with relevant standards and regulations

lifestyle.description: Work blends engineering, risk assessment, and cross‑team coordination. Often involves rigorous documentation and regulatory engagement.

habits: Performs hazard and failure mode analyses
Defines safety requirements and monitors compliance
Validates systems under edge and adversarial conditions
